appraisal_events.evidence: « Ne prononcez jamais son nom devant moi ! » ... « Brusquement il cessa de venir, sans avoir prévenu. » ... « Il y annonçait à cette femme qu'il allait quitter Paris... Elle était sa maîtresse... c'était elle seule qu'il avait jugé utile d'avertir. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents a pattern in which Swann leaves acquaintances abruptly without notice and is later repudiated by a 'new friend'; the reveal that he was visiting for an affair with the cook and only informed her further lowers him.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Swann's standing declines: an acquaintance rejects even hearing his name, and his behavior appears socially inconsiderate and compromising.
